tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 1
tasks.description:
Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

REVIEW FAIL (code): TR-018-003/006 — Hollow and broken tests.
  WHERE: src/commands/plan-top-level.test.ts
  EXPECTED: Assertions checking actual CLI output and state changes. No global mocking that breaks PlanStore methods.
  ACTUAL: try/catch blocks swallow errors; vi.mock hoisting removes seedFromFile and scanReadiness from PlanStore in tests.
  FIX: Use vi.spyOn or vi.doMock to avoid global interference. Add real output assertions for all subcommands. Ensure seed/init actually populate the DB in integration tests.

RE-OPENED (UAT): Tests in src/commands/plan-top-level.test.ts for 'seed' and 'init' remain hollow and continue to use try/catch blocks to swallow errors, failing to meet the remediation standard.

doneWhen: `gwrk plan seed --dry-run` shows valid seed payload from 000-build-plan.md
`gwrk plan init` discovers features from `specs/` and assigns correct readiness levels
`gwrk plan status` displays current project state from SQLite
Every `gwrk plan` subcommand on empty graph prints `No build plan data. Run 'gwrk plan seed' or 'gwrk plan init'.` and exits 1

phases.title: Solver Engine & Ready Queue

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/plan-solver.ts
tasks.description:
NEW: Graph analysis logic using graphology.

REVIEW FAIL (code): FR-003 — Ready queue sorting.
  WHERE: src/engine/plan-solver.ts:88-112
  EXPECTED: readyPhases.sort((a, b) => criticalPathPriority(a, b))
  ACTUAL: return readyPhases; (unsorted)
  FIX: Implement sorting by critical path priority (slack ascending), then by Most Successors First.
REVIEW FAIL (lint): FR-018 — Non-null assertions.
  WHERE: src/engine/plan-solver.ts:131, 152, 169, 200, 205
  EXPECTED: Safe access with guards or error handling.
  ACTUAL: Non-null assertions (!).
  FIX: Replace '!' with proper null-checks or descriptive error throws.

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/plan.ts
tasks.description:
MODIFY: Add next, critical, waves subcommands.

REVIEW FAIL (logic): FR-003 — Subcommand output ranking.
  WHERE: src/commands/plan.ts
  EXPECTED: Correct ranking in 'next' command output based on critical path.
  ACTUAL: Unsorted output due to broken T009.
  FIX: Ensure T009 is fixed and verify CLI output ranking.

tasks.title: Implement package.json

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 2
tasks.description:
Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

REVIEW FAIL (code): TR-018-003 — Hollow tests.
  WHERE: src/commands/plan.phase2.test.ts
  EXPECTED: Assertions for success scenarios checking actual CLI output content.
  ACTUAL: try/catch block with no success assertions (passes if no error thrown).
  FIX: Add actual output assertions for 'next', 'critical', and 'waves' commands. Use a mock store with a known graph to verify sorting.

doneWhen: `gwrk plan critical` identifies the zero-slack path through the current project
`gwrk plan critical` warns `⚠️ {id} has no SP estimate` for any critical-path node without SP
`gwrk plan waves` groups tasks into mathematically parallelizable generations
